text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During training, I notice Air Groove stumbling for
a moment.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You could say that—I went to bed later than I
intended. The moon was so beautiful, I...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No, I needn't go into that. Forget I said anything.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Fine... I tried reading under the moonlight and...
completely lost track of the time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But this is a problem of my own doing! Now, let's
get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We return to training, but Air Groove remains a
little off form.
